games.headline: Philadelphia 5, Toronto 2 — Sánchez (W)
games.summary: An A.García two-run home run broke the game open, and C.Sánchez struck out ten batters over seven innings to guide the Phillies past the Blue Jays 5-2. J.Duran finished the job with a scoreless ninth inning to secure the save.

games.headline: Washington 4, San Francisco 3 — Beeter (W)
games.summary: Clayton Beeter pitched 1.1 innings, allowing 2 earned runs, leading Washington past San Francisco 4-3 at Oracle Park. Keaton Winn lasted 0.2 innings, giving up 3 earned runs, 1 strikeouts. Offensively for Washington: L.Jr. went 2-for-4, including 1 double with 1 RBI; C.Abrams went 2-for-4 with 2 RBI. Gus Varland closed it out for the save.

games.headline: San Diego 6, Cincinnati 2 — Morejon (W)
games.summary: S.Taylor turned the tide with a three-RBI performance on two hits, powering the Padres past the Reds in a 6-2 victory at Petco Park. Relief pitcher Adrian Morejon earned the win for the hosts, while Andrew Abbott took the loss.

games.headline: New York 7, Cleveland 5 (F/10)
games.summary: Cody Bellinger broke a tense tenth-inning tie with a clutch two-run single, lifting the Yankees to a 7-5 victory over the Guardians at Progressive Field after reliever David Bednar threw one and two-thirds scoreless innings to secure the win.

games.headline: Seattle 6, Baltimore 3 — Hancock (W)
games.summary: J.Naylor fueled the Mariners offense with a home run and four RBIs, breaking the game open to secure a 6-3 victory over the Orioles. E.Hancock earned the win after throwing five innings, and A.Muñoz secured the save.

games.headline: Milwaukee 15, Athletics 14 (F/12)
games.summary: W.Contreras capped a wild, marathon night by driving in the winning run in the 12th inning as the Brewers outlasted the Athletics, 15-14. His three-run homer earlier set the stage for a tense extra-innings battle before C.Patrick secured the final three outs to shut the door.
